children.heading: .—Combatant Command Budgets
children.label: a .—Combatant Command Budgets
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall include in the annual budget of the Department of Defense submitted to Congress a separate budget proposal for such activities of each of the unified and specified combatant commands as may be determined under subsection (b).

children.heading: .—SOF Training With Foreign Forces
children.label: c .—SOF Training With Foreign Forces
children.text: A funding proposal for force training under subsection (b)(2) may include amounts for training expense payments authorized in .section 322 of this title
